message:
fix(tests): update mux_client tests for codec skip_serializing_if removal (ft-1qbjk)

After removing skip_serializing_if from GetPaneRenderChangesResponse:

1. Partial compressed frame tests: the payload may no longer auto-compress
   since the extra None tag byte changes the compression ratio. Use
   CompressionMode::Always to guarantee compressed frame paths are exercised.

2. Unexpected response test: the expected error message changed from
   "GetPaneRenderChangesResponse" to "LivenessResponse or
   GetPaneRenderChangesResponse" after resolve_render_change_response
   was updated to accept LivenessResponse.

Verified: 93/93 mux_client tests pass, 70/70 mux_pool tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
